<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Analyzers; use Intervention\Image\Collection; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; class PixelColorsAnalyzer extends PixelColorAnalyzer { public function analyze(ImageInterface $image): mixed { $colors = new Collection(); $colorspace = $image->colorspace(); foreach ($image as $frame) { $colors->push( parent::colorAt($colorspace, $frame->native()) ); } return $colors; } }
